title: New PTSD Treatment Center Opens for IDF Veterans
summary: A new state-of-the-art rehabilitation center dedicated to post-trauma care for veterans has opened, offering innovative therapies not previously available in Israel.
content:
A new state-of-the-art rehabilitation center dedicated to post-trauma care for veterans has opened this week.

The center offers a range of innovative therapies, including physiological and technology-assisted approaches not previously available in Israel.

Genesis Friends For Life helped connect the initiative to international expertise and funding.

title: IDF Rehabilitation Department Reform: New Plans for Veterans
summary: A public committee has proposed an IDF Rehabilitation Department reform to streamline bureaucracy, provide personal mentors, and expand mental health support.
content:
A public committee in Israel recently submitted recommendations for a comprehensive IDF Rehabilitation Department reform to improve support for wounded veterans. The proposed plan includes transforming the department into an independent authority and assigning a personal mentor to every injured soldier to simplify bureaucratic processes.

The reform focuses on expanding mental health services and implementing a holistic rehabilitation approach tailored to individual needs. These structural changes are vital for soldiers injured in recent conflict and align with the mission of Genesis Friends For Life to accelerate trauma and PTSD solutions. This IDF Rehabilitation Department reform aims to prioritize national resilience by placing personal guidance and mental health care at the forefront of the recovery process.
